description: Mornings can be hectic and skipping breakfast is not a wise option. Overnight oatmeal flavored with pineapple, banana, and pecans is an awesome way to start the day. It's a healthy, quick-and-easy, nutrient packed, make-ahead breakfast ready when you are.
ingredients: 1/4 cup chopped toasted pecans, or to taste
directions: Combine oats, almond milk, pineapple and its juice, vanilla, cardamom, and salt in a bowl. Stir well, and spoon out into half-pint jars. Cover jars with lids, and refrigerate overnight.
The following morning, stir in bananas, top with pecans, and enjoy.
ingredient_text: old fashioned rolled oats unsweetened almond milk crushed pineapple in pineapple juice vanilla extract cardamom optional salt bananas sliced chopped toasted pecans taste
directions_text: combine oats, almond milk, pineapple and its juice, vanilla, cardamom, and salt in a bowl. stir well, and spoon out into half-pint jars. cover jars with lids, and refrigerate overnight. the following morning, stir in bananas, top with pecans, and enjoy.
combined_text: overnight pineapple-banana oatmeal overnight oats overnight oats 2 cups old fashioned rolled oats 1 1/2 cups unsweetened almond milk 1 1 crushed pineapple in pineapple juice 1/2 teaspoon vanilla extract 1/2 teaspoon cardamom (optional) 1/8 teaspoon salt 2 bananas, sliced 1/4 cup chopped toasted pecans, or to taste combine oats, almond milk, pineapple and its juice, vanilla, cardamom, and salt in a bowl. stir well, and spoon out into half-pint jars. cover jars with lids, and refrigerate overnight. the following morning, stir in bananas, top with pecans, and enjoy.
ingredients_raw: 1/4 cup chopped toasted pecans, or to taste
directions_raw: Combine oats, almond milk, pineapple and its juice, vanilla, cardamom, and salt in a bowl. Stir well, and spoon out into half-pint jars. Cover jars with lids, and refrigerate overnight.
The following morning, stir in bananas, top with pecans, and enjoy.

description: I love overnight oats! They're easy to make-ahead for a quick, on-the-go breakfast. Though this recipe calls for blueberries, you can use almost any fruit. Bananas, peaches, or any variety of berries work best. Top with your favorite nuts or seeds.
ingredients: ¼ teaspoon ground cinnamon or more to taste
directions: Gather all ingredients.
Combine milk, yogurt, oats, honey, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a 1/2-pint jar with a lid; cover and shake until combined.
Fold in blueberries.
Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. Enjoy!
ingredient_text: ⅓ milk ¼ greek yogurt ¼ rolled oats honey chia seeds ¼ ground cinnamon more taste ¼ fresh blueberries
directions_text: gather all ingredients. combine milk, yogurt, oats, honey, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a 1/2-pint jar with a lid; cover and shake until combined. fold in blueberries. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. enjoy!
combined_text: easy overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats ⅓ cup milk ¼ cup greek yogurt ¼ cup rolled oats 2 teaspoons honey 2 teaspoons chia seeds ¼ teaspoon ground cinnamon or more to taste ¼ cup fresh blueberries gather all ingredients. combine milk, yogurt, oats, honey, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a 1/2-pint jar with a lid; cover and shake until combined. fold in blueberries. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. enjoy!
ingredients_raw: ¼ teaspoon ground cinnamon or more to taste
directions_raw: Gather all ingredients.
Combine milk, yogurt, oats, honey, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a 1/2-pint jar with a lid; cover and shake until combined.
Fold in blueberries.
Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. Enjoy!

description: This overnight baked oatmeal has a tender, yet chewy texture, fun flavor combination ideas, and just the right amount of sweetness and spice.
ingredients: 2 cups milk or unsweetened plant milk of your choice
directions: Gather all ingredients.
Grease a 2-quart rectangular baking dish.
Whisk eggs, milk, maple syrup, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt together in the prepared dish.
Stir in oats and amaranth. If desired, stir in flavor variation mix-ins (see below).
Cover and chill at least overnight or up to 3 days.
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (180 degrees C). Uncover and stir to re-incorporate all of the ingredients.
Bake, uncovered, until golden brown and the center is set, 45 to 55 minutes.
Let stand 10 minutes before serving. Serve warm.
ingredient_text: large eggs milk unsweetened plant milk your choice maple syrup packed brown sugar vanilla extract ground cinnamon salt rolled oats not quick cooking amaranth
directions_text: gather all ingredients. grease a 2-quart rectangular baking dish. whisk eggs, milk, maple syrup, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt together in the prepared dish. stir in oats and amaranth. if desired, stir in flavor variation mix-ins (see below). cover and chill at least overnight or up to 3 days. preheat the oven to 350 degrees f (180 degrees c). uncover and stir to re-incorporate all of the ingredients. bake, uncovered, until golden brown and the center is set, 45 to 55 minutes. let stand 10 minutes before serving. serve warm.
combined_text: overnight baked oatmeal overnight oats overnight oats 2 large eggs 2 cups milk or unsweetened plant milk of your choice 1/4 cup maple syrup 1/4 cup packed brown sugar 1 teaspoon vanilla extract 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon 1/2 teaspoon salt 2 cups rolled oats (not quick cooking) 1/3 cup amaranth gather all ingredients. grease a 2-quart rectangular baking dish. whisk eggs, milk, maple syrup, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt together in the prepared dish. stir in oats and amaranth. if desired, stir in flavor variation mix-ins (see below). cover and chill at least overnight or up to 3 days. preheat the oven to 350 degrees f (180 degrees c). uncover and stir to re-incorporate all of the ingredients. bake, uncovered, until golden brown and the center is set, 45 to 55 minutes. let stand 10 minutes before serving. serve warm.
ingredients_raw: 2 cups milk or unsweetened plant milk of your choice
directions_raw: Gather all ingredients.
Grease a 2-quart rectangular baking dish.
Whisk eggs, milk, maple syrup, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, and salt together in the prepared dish.
Stir in oats and amaranth. If desired, stir in flavor variation mix-ins (see below).
Cover and chill at least overnight or up to 3 days.
Preheat the oven to 350 degrees F (180 degrees C). Uncover and stir to re-incorporate all of the ingredients.
Bake, uncovered, until golden brown and the center is set, 45 to 55 minutes.
Let stand 10 minutes before serving. Serve warm.
ingredients_canonical: milk unsweetened plant milk your choice

description: Prep this fruity, creamy berry overnight oats recipe the night before, and you'll have a quick, fresh breakfast in the morning.
ingredients: ½ cup quick or old fashioned oats, (such as Quaker Oats), uncooked
½ cup nonfat plain Greek yogurt
1 cup fresh mixed berries and fruit
directions: Add oats to the container of choice; pour in milk.
Layer in Greek yogurt, chia seeds, and mixed berries and fruit.
Refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
ingredient_text: ½ quick old fashioned oats such as quaker oats uncooked ½ nonfat milk ½ nonfat plain greek yogurt chia seeds optional fresh mixed berries fruit
directions_text: add oats to the container of choice; pour in milk. layer in greek yogurt, chia seeds, and mixed berries and fruit. refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
combined_text: berry overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats ½ cup quick or old fashioned oats, (such as quaker oats), uncooked ½ cup nonfat milk ½ cup nonfat plain greek yogurt 1 teaspoon chia seeds (optional) 1 cup fresh mixed berries and fruit add oats to the container of choice; pour in milk. layer in greek yogurt, chia seeds, and mixed berries and fruit. refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.

½ cup nonfat plain Greek yogurt
1 cup fresh mixed berries and fruit
directions_raw: Add oats to the container of choice; pour in milk.
Layer in Greek yogurt, chia seeds, and mixed berries and fruit.
Refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
ingredients_canonical: ½ quick old fashioned oats such as quaker oats uncooked

description: Try these overnight oats with almond milk for a quick and easy, healthy yet tasty, on-the-go breakfast!
directions: Stir together almond milk, oats, chia seeds, honey, cinnamon, vanilla, and salt in a jar or container with a lid. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.
ingredient_text: ¾ almond milk ¼ rolled oats chia seeds honey ground cinnamon ½ vanilla extract pinch salt
directions_text: stir together almond milk, oats, chia seeds, honey, cinnamon, vanilla, and salt in a jar or container with a lid. cover and refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.
combined_text: almond milk overnight chia oats overnight oats overnight oats ¾ cup almond milk ¼ cup rolled oats 1 tablespoon chia seeds 1 tablespoon honey 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon ½ teaspoon vanilla extract 1 pinch salt stir together almond milk, oats, chia seeds, honey, cinnamon, vanilla, and salt in a jar or container with a lid. cover and refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.
directions_raw: Stir together almond milk, oats, chia seeds, honey, cinnamon, vanilla, and salt in a jar or container with a lid. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours to overnight.

description: A yummy breakfast that is healthy but doesn't leave you feeling deprived, these no-cook coconut overnight oats will be creamy by morning and make breakfast prep time non-existent. Put all ingredients in a 12-ounce mason jar and vigorously shake to make preparation a breeze!
ingredients: ¾ cup old-fashioned rolled oats (such a Quaker®)
directions: Mix almond milk, oats, chia seeds, coconut, maple syrup, cocoa powder, and vanilla extract in a 12-ounce mason jar.
Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. Stir and serve cold.
ingredient_text: chocolate-flavored almond milk ¾ old-fashioned rolled oats such a quaker chia seeds packed shredded sweetened coconut maple syrup unsweetened cocoa powder splash vanilla extract
directions_text: mix almond milk, oats, chia seeds, coconut, maple syrup, cocoa powder, and vanilla extract in a 12-ounce mason jar. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. stir and serve cold.
combined_text: chocolate coconut overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats 1 cup chocolate-flavored almond milk ¾ cup old-fashioned rolled oats (such a quaker®) 1 tablespoon chia seeds 1 tablespoon packed shredded sweetened coconut 1 tablespoon maple syrup 1 tablespoon unsweetened cocoa powder 1 splash vanilla extract mix almond milk, oats, chia seeds, coconut, maple syrup, cocoa powder, and vanilla extract in a 12-ounce mason jar. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. stir and serve cold.
ingredients_raw: ¾ cup old-fashioned rolled oats (such a Quaker®)
directions_raw: Mix almond milk, oats, chia seeds, coconut, maple syrup, cocoa powder, and vanilla extract in a 12-ounce mason jar.
Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. Stir and serve cold.

recipe_title: Overnight Steel-Cut Oats with Yogurt and Blueberries
description: Overnight steel-cut oats with yogurt, stevia powder, coconut milk, and blueberries.
ingredients: ½ ounce stevia powder (such as Pure Via)
directions: Place oats into the bottom of a 1-pint Mason jar. Stir in yogurt, blueberries, and stevia powder. Pour in coconut milk and stir to combine.
Cover the jar and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
ingredient_text: ¼ steel-cut oats ounce container plain yogurt ounces fresh blueberries ½ ounce stevia powder such as pure via ½ ounces coconut milk
directions_text: place oats into the bottom of a 1-pint mason jar. stir in yogurt, blueberries, and stevia powder. pour in coconut milk and stir to combine. cover the jar and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
combined_text: overnight steel-cut oats with yogurt and blueberries overnight oats overnight oats ¼ cup steel-cut oats 1 (8 ounce) container plain yogurt 2 ounces fresh blueberries ½ ounce stevia powder (such as pure via) 4 ½ ounces coconut milk place oats into the bottom of a 1-pint mason jar. stir in yogurt, blueberries, and stevia powder. pour in coconut milk and stir to combine. cover the jar and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
ingredients_raw: ½ ounce stevia powder (such as Pure Via)
directions_raw: Place oats into the bottom of a 1-pint Mason jar. Stir in yogurt, blueberries, and stevia powder. Pour in coconut milk and stir to combine.
Cover the jar and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
ingredients_canonical: ½ ounce stevia powder such as pure via

description: This oatmeal with jam is a filling, sweet, and healthy breakfast that gives you energy during the day. Make it the night before, and let it chill overnight in the fridge.
directions: Stir together yogurt, oats, jam, and chia seeds in a jar or container. Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
ingredient_text: greek yogurt ½ rolled oats strawberry jam chia seeds optional
directions_text: stir together yogurt, oats, jam, and chia seeds in a jar or container. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
combined_text: overnight oats with jam overnight oats overnight oats 1 cup greek yogurt ½ cup rolled oats 4 tablespoons strawberry jam 2 tablespoons chia seeds (optional) stir together yogurt, oats, jam, and chia seeds in a jar or container. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
directions_raw: Stir together yogurt, oats, jam, and chia seeds in a jar or container. Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.

description: I combined overnight oats with blueberries, banana, and almond vanilla milk and turned it into a yummy blueberry smoothie bowl! Top with whatever seeds, nuts, or berries you enjoy!
ingredients: 1 ¼ cups unsweetened vanilla-flavored almond milk, divided
1 teaspoon maple syrup, or to taste
directions: Combine oats and 2/3 cup almond milk in a bowl; cover and refrigerate until milk is absorbed by oats, 8 hours to overnight.
Combine oats-almond milk mixture, remaining almond milk, banana, blueberries, vanilla, and maple syrup in a blender; blend until smooth.
Pour smoothie into 2 bowls, then top with coconut, blueberries, and chia seeds.
ingredient_text: rolled oats ¼ unsweetened vanilla-flavored almond milk divided frozen banana chopped blueberries vanilla extract maple syrup taste
directions_text: combine oats and 2/3 cup almond milk in a bowl; cover and refrigerate until milk is absorbed by oats, 8 hours to overnight. combine oats-almond milk mixture, remaining almond milk, banana, blueberries, vanilla, and maple syrup in a blender; blend until smooth. pour smoothie into 2 bowls, then top with coconut, blueberries, and chia seeds.
combined_text: overnight oats blueberry smoothie bowl overnight oats overnight oats 1 cup rolled oats 1 ¼ cups unsweetened vanilla-flavored almond milk, divided 1 frozen banana, chopped 1 cup blueberries 1 teaspoon vanilla extract 1 teaspoon maple syrup, or to taste combine oats and 2/3 cup almond milk in a bowl; cover and refrigerate until milk is absorbed by oats, 8 hours to overnight. combine oats-almond milk mixture, remaining almond milk, banana, blueberries, vanilla, and maple syrup in a blender; blend until smooth. pour smoothie into 2 bowls, then top with coconut, blueberries, and chia seeds.
ingredients_raw: 1 ¼ cups unsweetened vanilla-flavored almond milk, divided
1 teaspoon maple syrup, or to taste
directions_raw: Combine oats and 2/3 cup almond milk in a bowl; cover and refrigerate until milk is absorbed by oats, 8 hours to overnight.
Combine oats-almond milk mixture, remaining almond milk, banana, blueberries, vanilla, and maple syrup in a blender; blend until smooth.
Pour smoothie into 2 bowls, then top with coconut, blueberries, and chia seeds.
ingredients_canonical: ¼ unsweetened vanilla-flavored almond milk divided

description: In this overnight oats recipe, almond milk and oats make a great no-cook oatmeal. Change it up with different almond milk flavors and toppings.
ingredients: 1 ⅓ cups Almond Breeze Vanilla almondmilk
3 tablespoons coarsely chopped Blue Diamond® Honey Roasted Almonds (Optional)
directions: Stir together almond milk and oats in a medium bowl. Spoon into 2 small bowls or canning jars if desired. Cover and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight, or for up to 3 days.
Before eating, top with granola and almonds, if desired.
ingredient_text: ⅓ almond breeze vanilla almondmilk rolled oats ¼ granola optional coarsely chopped blue diamond honey roasted almonds optional
directions_text: stir together almond milk and oats in a medium bowl. spoon into 2 small bowls or canning jars if desired. cover and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight, or for up to 3 days. before eating, top with granola and almonds, if desired.
combined_text: classic overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats 1 ⅓ cups almond breeze vanilla almondmilk 1 cup rolled oats ¼ cup granola (optional) 3 tablespoons coarsely chopped blue diamond® honey roasted almonds (optional) stir together almond milk and oats in a medium bowl. spoon into 2 small bowls or canning jars if desired. cover and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight, or for up to 3 days. before eating, top with granola and almonds, if desired.
ingredients_raw: 1 ⅓ cups Almond Breeze Vanilla almondmilk
3 tablespoons coarsely chopped Blue Diamond® Honey Roasted Almonds (Optional)
directions_raw: Stir together almond milk and oats in a medium bowl. Spoon into 2 small bowls or canning jars if desired. Cover and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight, or for up to 3 days.
Before eating, top with granola and almonds, if desired.

description: A variation from overnight oats recipe from Alli Shircliff. This is for anyone who doesn't/can't eat oatmeal but wants a delicious, fast, and healthy breakfast. This uses buckwheat flakes--not the cereal flakes but rolled and flaked buckwheat. They look very similar to oatmeal flakes but are much smaller. Mix in agave and berries. Eat and enjoy!
directions: Combine buckwheat, chia seeds, 1 1/2 teaspoons coconut, flax seed meal, cinnamon, and vanilla powder in a jar; stir until well mixed. Stir in milk; cover. Place in the refrigerator, 8 hours to overnight.
Stir buckwheat mixture. Heat in the microwave for 30 seconds. Stir in mixed berries, remaining coconut, and agave.
ingredient_text: ¼ buckwheat flakes chia seeds coconut divided flax seed meal ⅛ ground cinnamon ⅛ vanilla powder ⅓ milk mixed berries agave
directions_text: combine buckwheat, chia seeds, 1 1/2 teaspoons coconut, flax seed meal, cinnamon, and vanilla powder in a jar; stir until well mixed. stir in milk; cover. place in the refrigerator, 8 hours to overnight. stir buckwheat mixture. heat in the microwave for 30 seconds. stir in mixed berries, remaining coconut, and agave.
combined_text: overnight buckwheat oats overnight oats overnight oats ¼ cup buckwheat flakes 2 teaspoons chia seeds 1 tablespoon coconut, divided 1 teaspoon flax seed meal ⅛ teaspoon ground cinnamon ⅛ teaspoon vanilla powder ⅓ cup milk 2 tablespoons mixed berries 1 teaspoon agave combine buckwheat, chia seeds, 1 1/2 teaspoons coconut, flax seed meal, cinnamon, and vanilla powder in a jar; stir until well mixed. stir in milk; cover. place in the refrigerator, 8 hours to overnight. stir buckwheat mixture. heat in the microwave for 30 seconds. stir in mixed berries, remaining coconut, and agave.
directions_raw: Combine buckwheat, chia seeds, 1 1/2 teaspoons coconut, flax seed meal, cinnamon, and vanilla powder in a jar; stir until well mixed. Stir in milk; cover. Place in the refrigerator, 8 hours to overnight.
Stir buckwheat mixture. Heat in the microwave for 30 seconds. Stir in mixed berries, remaining coconut, and agave.

description: A little sweetness is all you need and vanilla extract makes it taste gourmet. You can get creative with this recipe and use berries instead of bananas, flax seeds instead of chia, or any unsweetened nut milk or nut butter that you fancy.
ingredients: 1 tablespoon unsweetened almond butter, or more to taste
directions: Place 3 to 4 slices of banana in the bottom of a jar. Layer 1 1/2 teaspoon of almond butter, 1/2 teaspoon chia seeds, and 1/2 cup oats on top. Repeat layering remaining almond butter, chia seeds, and oats, leaving a 1-inch gap at the top.

Mix almond milk, maple syrup, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Pour over oats, leaving a 1/2-inch gap at the top to allow oats to expands as they soak. Push a knife or fork vertically through the jar to make sure milk mixture soaks all the way through.
Cover jar tightly and refrigerate until oats are moist, 4 hours to overnight.
ingredient_text: banana sliced unsweetened almond butter more taste ½ chia seeds rolled oats unsweetened almond milk pure maple syrup ¼ vanilla extract
directions_text: place 3 to 4 slices of banana in the bottom of a jar. layer 1 1/2 teaspoon of almond butter, 1/2 teaspoon chia seeds, and 1/2 cup oats on top. repeat layering remaining almond butter, chia seeds, and oats, leaving a 1-inch gap at the top. mix almond milk, maple syrup, and vanilla extract in a bowl. pour over oats, leaving a 1/2-inch gap at the top to allow oats to expands as they soak. push a knife or fork vertically through the jar to make sure milk mixture soaks all the way through. cover jar tightly and refrigerate until oats are moist, 4 hours to overnight.
combined_text: easy, healthy no-cook overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats 1 banana, sliced 1 tablespoon unsweetened almond butter, or more to taste 1 ½ teaspoons chia seeds 1 cup rolled oats 1 cup unsweetened almond milk 1 teaspoon pure maple syrup ¼ teaspoon vanilla extract place 3 to 4 slices of banana in the bottom of a jar. layer 1 1/2 teaspoon of almond butter, 1/2 teaspoon chia seeds, and 1/2 cup oats on top. repeat layering remaining almond butter, chia seeds, and oats, leaving a 1-inch gap at the top. mix almond milk, maple syrup, and vanilla extract in a bowl. pour over oats, leaving a 1/2-inch gap at the top to allow oats to expands as they soak. push a knife or fork vertically through the jar to make sure milk mixture soaks all the way through. cover jar tightly and refrigerate until oats are moist, 4 hours to overnight.
ingredients_raw: 1 tablespoon unsweetened almond butter, or more to taste
directions_raw: Place 3 to 4 slices of banana in the bottom of a jar. Layer 1 1/2 teaspoon of almond butter, 1/2 teaspoon chia seeds, and 1/2 cup oats on top. Repeat layering remaining almond butter, chia seeds, and oats, leaving a 1-inch gap at the top.

Mix almond milk, maple syrup, and vanilla extract in a bowl. Pour over oats, leaving a 1/2-inch gap at the top to allow oats to expands as they soak. Push a knife or fork vertically through the jar to make sure milk mixture soaks all the way through.
Cover jar tightly and refrigerate until oats are moist, 4 hours to overnight.

description: This grab-and-go breakfast has it all: quick prep, easily customizable, great flavor with tons of health benefits. These oats are packed with whole grains, calcium, protein, and vitamins.
ingredients: 2 tablespoons powdered peanut butter (such as PB2®)
directions: Mix almond milk, raspberries, rolled oats, powdered peanut butter, chia seeds, and sugar together in a container. Cover and refrigerate until oats are soft, 8 hours to overnight.
ingredient_text: ½ almond milk ¼ fresh raspberries ¼ rolled oats powdered peanut butter such as pb ½ chia seeds white sugar
directions_text: mix almond milk, raspberries, rolled oats, powdered peanut butter, chia seeds, and sugar together in a container. cover and refrigerate until oats are soft, 8 hours to overnight.
combined_text: overnight light pb&j oats overnight oats overnight oats ½ cup almond milk ¼ cup fresh raspberries ¼ cup rolled oats 2 tablespoons powdered peanut butter (such as pb2®) 1 ½ teaspoons chia seeds 1 teaspoon white sugar mix almond milk, raspberries, rolled oats, powdered peanut butter, chia seeds, and sugar together in a container. cover and refrigerate until oats are soft, 8 hours to overnight.

directions_raw: Mix almond milk, raspberries, rolled oats, powdered peanut butter, chia seeds, and sugar together in a container. Cover and refrigerate until oats are soft, 8 hours to overnight.

recipe_title: Overnight Coconut Pecan Steel Cut Oats
description: No-cook method of preparing steel cut oats. Soaking overnight makes for a chewy and hearty wholesome breakfast or snack that is ready when you are to eat.
directions: Mix oats, coconut, pecans, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a small container; top with 1/3 cup milk. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight. Stir 1 tablespoon milk into oat mixture before serving.
ingredient_text: ⅓ steel cut oats unsweetened shredded coconut crushed pecans ½ brown sugar ⅛ ground cinnamon ⅓ milk milk
directions_text: mix oats, coconut, pecans, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a small container; top with 1/3 cup milk. cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight. stir 1 tablespoon milk into oat mixture before serving.
combined_text: overnight coconut pecan steel cut oats overnight oats overnight oats ⅓ cup steel cut oats 1 tablespoon unsweetened shredded coconut 1 tablespoon crushed pecans ½ teaspoon brown sugar ⅛ teaspoon ground cinnamon ⅓ cup milk 1 tablespoon milk mix oats, coconut, pecans, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a small container; top with 1/3 cup milk. cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight. stir 1 tablespoon milk into oat mixture before serving.
directions_raw: Mix oats, coconut, pecans, brown sugar, and cinnamon in a small container; top with 1/3 cup milk. Cover and refrigerate for 8 hours or overnight. Stir 1 tablespoon milk into oat mixture before serving.

description: All the delicious warm spices of banana bread are added to these easy-to-prepare overnight oats. Bananas are stirred in for banana bread flavour in a jiffy.
ingredients: 3 cups (750 mL) Large Flake Quaker® Oats
1 cup Plain or vanilla non-fat yogurt
directions: Stir together milk, honey, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg and salt; stir in oats. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Mash two bananas and stir into oatmeal. Slice remaining banana. Divide oatmeal evenly among bowls or small Mason jars; top with sliced banana, pecans, and yogurt (if using).
ingredient_text: skim milk honey brown sugar vanilla extract ½ ground cinnamon ¼ ground nutmeg ¼ salt bananas divided large flake quaker oats ¼ chopped toasted pecans plain vanilla non-fat yogurt
directions_text: stir together milk, honey, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg and salt; stir in oats. cover and refrigerate overnight. mash two bananas and stir into oatmeal. slice remaining banana. divide oatmeal evenly among bowls or small mason jars; top with sliced banana, pecans, and yogurt (if using).
combined_text: quaker® banana bread overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats 3 cups skim or 1% milk 2 tablespoons honey 2 tablespoons brown sugar 1 teaspoon vanilla extract ½ teaspoon ground cinnamon ¼ teaspoon ground nutmeg ¼ teaspoon salt 3 bananas, divided 3 cups (750 ml) large flake quaker® oats ¼ cup chopped toasted pecans 1 cup plain or vanilla non-fat yogurt stir together milk, honey, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg and salt; stir in oats. cover and refrigerate overnight. mash two bananas and stir into oatmeal. slice remaining banana. divide oatmeal evenly among bowls or small mason jars; top with sliced banana, pecans, and yogurt (if using).

1 cup Plain or vanilla non-fat yogurt
directions_raw: Stir together milk, honey, brown sugar, vanilla, cinnamon, nutmeg and salt; stir in oats. Cover and refrigerate overnight.
Mash two bananas and stir into oatmeal. Slice remaining banana. Divide oatmeal evenly among bowls or small Mason jars; top with sliced banana, pecans, and yogurt (if using).

description: I came up with how to cook steel-cut oats overnight by making four portions ahead and refrigerating them overnight because they take so long to cook. It's very hearty, delicious, and wholesome!
directions: Bring water and salt to a boil in a pot. Pour in oats and return to a boil while stirring. Reduce heat and let simmer until water is absorbed, 20 to 25 minutes.
Remove oats from heat and immediately stir in walnuts and raisins. Stir in agave nectar, vanilla extract, and cinnamon.
Divide oat mixture into 4 portions in bowls. Cover and refrigerate overnight, or up to 5 days.
When ready to prepare, add 2 tablespoons milk to each portion. Heat in a microwave for 1 minute and 30 seconds, stirring halfway through cook time.
ingredient_text: water dash salt steel-cut oats ¼ chopped walnuts ¼ raisins agave nectar vanilla extract ground cinnamon ½ milk
directions_text: bring water and salt to a boil in a pot. pour in oats and return to a boil while stirring. reduce heat and let simmer until water is absorbed, 20 to 25 minutes. remove oats from heat and immediately stir in walnuts and raisins. stir in agave nectar, vanilla extract, and cinnamon. divide oat mixture into 4 portions in bowls. cover and refrigerate overnight, or up to 5 days. when ready to prepare, add 2 tablespoons milk to each portion. heat in a microwave for 1 minute and 30 seconds, stirring halfway through cook time.
combined_text: make-ahead steel-cut oats overnight oats overnight oats 4 cups water 1 dash salt 1 cup steel-cut oats ¼ cup chopped walnuts ¼ cup raisins 2 tablespoons agave nectar 1 teaspoon vanilla extract 1 teaspoon ground cinnamon ½ cup milk bring water and salt to a boil in a pot. pour in oats and return to a boil while stirring. reduce heat and let simmer until water is absorbed, 20 to 25 minutes. remove oats from heat and immediately stir in walnuts and raisins. stir in agave nectar, vanilla extract, and cinnamon. divide oat mixture into 4 portions in bowls. cover and refrigerate overnight, or up to 5 days. when ready to prepare, add 2 tablespoons milk to each portion. heat in a microwave for 1 minute and 30 seconds, stirring halfway through cook time.
directions_raw: Bring water and salt to a boil in a pot. Pour in oats and return to a boil while stirring. Reduce heat and let simmer until water is absorbed, 20 to 25 minutes.
Remove oats from heat and immediately stir in walnuts and raisins. Stir in agave nectar, vanilla extract, and cinnamon.
Divide oat mixture into 4 portions in bowls. Cover and refrigerate overnight, or up to 5 days.
When ready to prepare, add 2 tablespoons milk to each portion. Heat in a microwave for 1 minute and 30 seconds, stirring halfway through cook time.

recipe_title: Overnight Oats with Strawberries and Greek Yogurt
description: Strawberry-yogurt overnight oats! An ultimate healthy pre-planned breakfast that is packed with fiber and protein. Garnish with granola, World of Chia Fruit Spread flavor, or fresh berries.
directions: Stir together oats, almond milk, and Greek yogurt in a bowl. Mix in strawberries, honey, and chia seeds until well combined. Spoon mixture into 3 glass jars with lids.
Refrigerate the jars overnight to allow the oats to soften. Serve cold in the morning.
ingredient_text: rolled oats almond milk greek yogurt chopped fresh strawberries honey chia seeds
directions_text: stir together oats, almond milk, and greek yogurt in a bowl. mix in strawberries, honey, and chia seeds until well combined. spoon mixture into 3 glass jars with lids. refrigerate the jars overnight to allow the oats to soften. serve cold in the morning.
combined_text: overnight oats with strawberries and greek yogurt overnight oats overnight oats 2 cups rolled oats 2 cups almond milk 1 cup greek yogurt 1 cup chopped fresh strawberries 1 tablespoon honey 1 tablespoon chia seeds stir together oats, almond milk, and greek yogurt in a bowl. mix in strawberries, honey, and chia seeds until well combined. spoon mixture into 3 glass jars with lids. refrigerate the jars overnight to allow the oats to soften. serve cold in the morning.
directions_raw: Stir together oats, almond milk, and Greek yogurt in a bowl. Mix in strawberries, honey, and chia seeds until well combined. Spoon mixture into 3 glass jars with lids.
Refrigerate the jars overnight to allow the oats to soften. Serve cold in the morning.

recipe_title: Vegan Overnight Oats with Chia Seeds and Fruit
description: Chia seeds, oats, and fruit soak overnight in almond milk for a nutritious vegan breakfast of champions! I like my oatmeal warm, so I heat it up in the morning.
directions: Combine almond milk, bananas, oats, water, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a jar or airtight container; stir together. Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Place oat mixture in a saucepan over low heat and gently cook for about 5 minutes. Divide between 2 bowls and top with blueberries, blackberries, and nectarine.
ingredient_text: ⅓ almond milk ripe bananas mashed ¼ rolled oats ¾ water chia seeds ½ ground cinnamon ¼ fresh blueberries ¼ fresh blackberries nectarine peeled diced
directions_text: combine almond milk, bananas, oats, water, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a jar or airtight container; stir together. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. place oat mixture in a saucepan over low heat and gently cook for about 5 minutes. divide between 2 bowls and top with blueberries, blackberries, and nectarine.
combined_text: vegan overnight oats with chia seeds and fruit overnight oats overnight oats 1 ⅓ cups almond milk 2 ripe bananas, mashed 1 ¼ cups rolled oats ¾ cup water 4 tablespoons chia seeds ½ teaspoon ground cinnamon ¼ cup fresh blueberries ¼ cup fresh blackberries 1 nectarine, peeled and diced combine almond milk, bananas, oats, water, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a jar or airtight container; stir together. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. place oat mixture in a saucepan over low heat and gently cook for about 5 minutes. divide between 2 bowls and top with blueberries, blackberries, and nectarine.
directions_raw: Combine almond milk, bananas, oats, water, chia seeds, and cinnamon in a jar or airtight container; stir together. Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Place oat mixture in a saucepan over low heat and gently cook for about 5 minutes. Divide between 2 bowls and top with blueberries, blackberries, and nectarine.

recipe_title: Blueberry-Cinnamon Overnight Oats with Greek Yogurt
description: Blueberries, cinnamon, and Greek yogurt are great additions to overnight oats.
ingredients: 1 tablespoon ground cinnamon, or to taste
directions: Combine rolled oats, blueberries, Greek yogurt, soy milk, cinnamon, and sugar in a lidded jar. Cover, shake to mix, and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
ingredient_text: ¾ rolled oats ½ blueberries ½ plain greek yogurt ¼ soy milk ground cinnamon taste sugar
directions_text: combine rolled oats, blueberries, greek yogurt, soy milk, cinnamon, and sugar in a lidded jar. cover, shake to mix, and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
combined_text: blueberry-cinnamon overnight oats with greek yogurt overnight oats overnight oats ¾ cup rolled oats ½ cup blueberries ½ cup plain greek yogurt ¼ cup soy milk 1 tablespoon ground cinnamon, or to taste 2 teaspoons sugar combine rolled oats, blueberries, greek yogurt, soy milk, cinnamon, and sugar in a lidded jar. cover, shake to mix, and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.
ingredients_raw: 1 tablespoon ground cinnamon, or to taste
directions_raw: Combine rolled oats, blueberries, Greek yogurt, soy milk, cinnamon, and sugar in a lidded jar. Cover, shake to mix, and refrigerate 8 hours to overnight.

recipe_title: Protein Powder Overnight Oats with Blueberries and Peanut Butter
description: Blueberries and peanut butter in these overnight oats make for a filling sweet breakfast. Packed with protein and sweetened with agave, these oats will surely keep you going until lunch time.
directions: Mix almond milk, oats, peanut butter, chia seeds, agave, and protein powder in a bowl until well combined. Divide mixture between 2 Mason jars. Top each jar with 1/2 cup blueberries. Refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.
ingredient_text: ¾ almond milk ½ oats peanut butter chia seeds agave nectar scoop vanilla protein powder frozen blueberries
directions_text: mix almond milk, oats, peanut butter, chia seeds, agave, and protein powder in a bowl until well combined. divide mixture between 2 mason jars. top each jar with 1/2 cup blueberries. refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.
combined_text: protein powder overnight oats with blueberries and peanut butter overnight oats overnight oats ¾ cup almond milk ½ cup oats 2 tablespoons peanut butter 2 tablespoons chia seeds 2 tablespoons agave nectar 1 scoop vanilla protein powder 1 cup frozen blueberries mix almond milk, oats, peanut butter, chia seeds, agave, and protein powder in a bowl until well combined. divide mixture between 2 mason jars. top each jar with 1/2 cup blueberries. refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.
directions_raw: Mix almond milk, oats, peanut butter, chia seeds, agave, and protein powder in a bowl until well combined. Divide mixture between 2 Mason jars. Top each jar with 1/2 cup blueberries. Refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.

description: Warm spices and a hint of brown sugar mixed with pumpkin signal that fall is in the air. This grab-and-go breakfast tastes like Thanksgiving.
ingredients: ⅔ cup Almond Breeze Original almondmilk
directions: In a pint jar or at least 12 ounce glass, mix oats and almondmilk. In a small bowl, mix pumpkin, brown sugar and spice. Spoon over oats. Cover; refrigerate 8 hours or overnight.
To serve, stir mixture and top with pepitas.
Refrigerate leftovers.
ingredient_text: ½ rolled oats ⅔ almond breeze original almondmilk canned pumpkin puree brown sugar ¼ pumpkin pie spice shelled roasted pepitas
directions_text: in a pint jar or at least 12 ounce glass, mix oats and almondmilk. in a small bowl, mix pumpkin, brown sugar and spice. spoon over oats. cover; refrigerate 8 hours or overnight. to serve, stir mixture and top with pepitas. refrigerate leftovers.
combined_text: pumpkin pie overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats ½ cup rolled oats ⅔ cup almond breeze original almondmilk 3 tablespoons canned pumpkin puree 2 teaspoons brown sugar ¼ teaspoon pumpkin pie spice 1 tablespoon shelled roasted pepitas in a pint jar or at least 12 ounce glass, mix oats and almondmilk. in a small bowl, mix pumpkin, brown sugar and spice. spoon over oats. cover; refrigerate 8 hours or overnight. to serve, stir mixture and top with pepitas. refrigerate leftovers.
ingredients_raw: ⅔ cup Almond Breeze Original almondmilk
directions_raw: In a pint jar or at least 12 ounce glass, mix oats and almondmilk. In a small bowl, mix pumpkin, brown sugar and spice. Spoon over oats. Cover; refrigerate 8 hours or overnight.
To serve, stir mixture and top with pepitas.
Refrigerate leftovers.

description: A spicy, molasses-y, and slightly tangy overnight oat recipe!
directions: Combine milk, oats, yogurt, brown sugar, flaxseed meal, molasses, vanilla extract, cinnamon, ginger, salt, nutmeg, cloves, and allspice in a glass container.
Refrigerate mixture 8 hours to overnight. Top with raisins and walnuts just before serving.
ingredient_text: ½ milk ½ rolled oats ¼ plain greek yogurt brown sugar flaxseed meal molasses ¼ vanilla extract ¼ ground cinnamon ¼ ground ginger pinch salt pinch ground nutmeg pinch ground cloves pinch ground allspice raisins optional chopped walnuts optional
directions_text: combine milk, oats, yogurt, brown sugar, flaxseed meal, molasses, vanilla extract, cinnamon, ginger, salt, nutmeg, cloves, and allspice in a glass container. refrigerate mixture 8 hours to overnight. top with raisins and walnuts just before serving.
combined_text: spicy gingerbread overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats ½ cup milk ½ cup rolled oats ¼ cup plain greek yogurt 1 tablespoon brown sugar 1 tablespoon flaxseed meal 1 teaspoon molasses ¼ teaspoon vanilla extract ¼ teaspoon ground cinnamon ¼ teaspoon ground ginger 1 pinch salt 1 pinch ground nutmeg 1 pinch ground cloves 1 pinch ground allspice 3 tablespoons raisins (optional) 3 tablespoons chopped walnuts (optional) combine milk, oats, yogurt, brown sugar, flaxseed meal, molasses, vanilla extract, cinnamon, ginger, salt, nutmeg, cloves, and allspice in a glass container. refrigerate mixture 8 hours to overnight. top with raisins and walnuts just before serving.
directions_raw: Combine milk, oats, yogurt, brown sugar, flaxseed meal, molasses, vanilla extract, cinnamon, ginger, salt, nutmeg, cloves, and allspice in a glass container.
Refrigerate mixture 8 hours to overnight. Top with raisins and walnuts just before serving.

recipe_title: Peanut Butter and Jelly Overnight Oats
description: These overnight oats are chock full of flavor, appealing to everyone, and almost hands-off. This is the perfect take-along breakfast!
ingredients: 2 tablespoons pure maple syrup, or more to taste
1 tablespoon peanut butter, or more to taste
directions: Whisk together almond milk, oats, 1/4 cup peanut butter, chia seeds, maple syrup, and salt in a bowl. Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Before serving, stir in strawberry preserves, remaining peanut butter, and more maple syrup if needed. Top with sliced strawberries and slivered almonds.
ingredient_text: ½ almond milk old-fashioned rolled oats ¼ peanut butter chia seeds pure maple syrup more taste pinch coarse salt ¼ strawberry preserves peanut butter more taste ½ sliced fresh strawberries ¼ slivered almonds
directions_text: whisk together almond milk, oats, 1/4 cup peanut butter, chia seeds, maple syrup, and salt in a bowl. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. before serving, stir in strawberry preserves, remaining peanut butter, and more maple syrup if needed. top with sliced strawberries and slivered almonds.
combined_text: peanut butter and jelly overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats 1 ½ cups almond milk 1 cup old-fashioned rolled oats ¼ cup peanut butter 2 tablespoons chia seeds 2 tablespoons pure maple syrup, or more to taste 1 pinch coarse salt ¼ cup strawberry preserves 1 tablespoon peanut butter, or more to taste ½ cup sliced fresh strawberries ¼ cup slivered almonds whisk together almond milk, oats, 1/4 cup peanut butter, chia seeds, maple syrup, and salt in a bowl. cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. before serving, stir in strawberry preserves, remaining peanut butter, and more maple syrup if needed. top with sliced strawberries and slivered almonds.
ingredients_raw: 2 tablespoons pure maple syrup, or more to taste
1 tablespoon peanut butter, or more to taste
directions_raw: Whisk together almond milk, oats, 1/4 cup peanut butter, chia seeds, maple syrup, and salt in a bowl. Cover and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Before serving, stir in strawberry preserves, remaining peanut butter, and more maple syrup if needed. Top with sliced strawberries and slivered almonds.

description: Components of a popular candy bar come together for a fun, yummy, and quick breakfast treat. Kids can have fun mixing up and topping their own jar of breakfast goodies.
ingredients: ⅔ cup Almond Breeze Chocolate Almondmilk
directions: In pint jar or at least 12-ounce glass, mix oats, almondmilk, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder. Cover; refrigerate at least 8 hours or overnight.
To serve, stir mixture and top with almonds, chocolate chips, and coconut.
ingredient_text: ½ rolled oats ⅔ almond breeze chocolate almondmilk powdered sugar unsweetened cocoa powder toasted slivered almonds mini chocolate chips flaked coconut
directions_text: in pint jar or at least 12-ounce glass, mix oats, almondmilk, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder. cover; refrigerate at least 8 hours or overnight. to serve, stir mixture and top with almonds, chocolate chips, and coconut.
combined_text: joyful chocolate overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats ½ cup rolled oats ⅔ cup almond breeze chocolate almondmilk 2 teaspoons powdered sugar 2 teaspoons unsweetened cocoa powder 1 tablespoon toasted slivered almonds 1 tablespoon mini chocolate chips 1 tablespoon flaked coconut in pint jar or at least 12-ounce glass, mix oats, almondmilk, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder. cover; refrigerate at least 8 hours or overnight. to serve, stir mixture and top with almonds, chocolate chips, and coconut.

directions_raw: In pint jar or at least 12-ounce glass, mix oats, almondmilk, powdered sugar, and cocoa powder. Cover; refrigerate at least 8 hours or overnight.
To serve, stir mixture and top with almonds, chocolate chips, and coconut.

description: Using a high-protein drink like Premier Protein® Salted Caramel and gingerbread morphs this regular overnight oats into the flavors of fall. I find adding the spices overnight dilutes the flavors, so I suggest waiting to add most of the spices before serving.
ingredients: 6 ounces caramel-flavored protein shake (such as Premier Protein®)
directions: Melt butter in a small pan over medium heat. Saute pear, walnuts, and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon until pear softens, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
Combine protein drink and oats in a small Mason jar. Mix in cooled pear and walnuts. Seal and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Add pumpkin spice, ginger, and remaining cinnamon to the oats the following morning. Stir to combine.
ingredient_text: butter ¼ pear chopped chopped walnuts ½ ground cinnamon divided ounces caramel-flavored protein shake such as premier protein ½ rolled oats pumpkin pie spice ½ ground ginger
directions_text: melt butter in a small pan over medium heat. saute pear, walnuts, and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon until pear softens, about 5 minutes. remove from heat and let cool. combine protein drink and oats in a small mason jar. mix in cooled pear and walnuts. seal and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. add pumpkin spice, ginger, and remaining cinnamon to the oats the following morning. stir to combine.
combined_text: overnight caramel gingerbread oats overnight oats overnight oats 1 tablespoon butter ¼ pear, chopped 2 tablespoons chopped walnuts ½ teaspoon ground cinnamon, divided 6 ounces caramel-flavored protein shake (such as premier protein®) ½ cup rolled oats 2 teaspoons pumpkin pie spice ½ teaspoon ground ginger melt butter in a small pan over medium heat. saute pear, walnuts, and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon until pear softens, about 5 minutes. remove from heat and let cool. combine protein drink and oats in a small mason jar. mix in cooled pear and walnuts. seal and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight. add pumpkin spice, ginger, and remaining cinnamon to the oats the following morning. stir to combine.
ingredients_raw: 6 ounces caramel-flavored protein shake (such as Premier Protein®)
directions_raw: Melt butter in a small pan over medium heat. Saute pear, walnuts, and 1/4 teaspoon cinnamon until pear softens, about 5 minutes. Remove from heat and let cool.
Combine protein drink and oats in a small Mason jar. Mix in cooled pear and walnuts. Seal and refrigerate, 8 hours to overnight.
Add pumpkin spice, ginger, and remaining cinnamon to the oats the following morning. Stir to combine.
ingredients_canonical: ounces caramel-flavored protein shake such as premier protein

description: An easy recipe for overnight oatmeal made in a slow cooker.
ingredients: ½ cup firmly packed light brown sugar
directions: Spray a small slow cooker lightly with cooking spray.
Mix oats, 1/2 cup brown sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a large bowl. Stir in pumpkin. Stir in water and half-and-half gradually. Stir in raisins and vanilla extract.
Ladle oat mixture into the slow cooker. Cook on Low until oats are soft and creamy, 7 1/2 to 8 1/2 hours.
Sprinkle 2 tablespoons plus 2 teaspoons brown sugar and 5 tablespoons plus 1 teaspoon walnuts over oatmeal.
ingredient_text: cooking spray steel-cut oats ½ firmly packed light brown sugar ½ ground cinnamon ¾ ground nutmeg canned pumpkin water fat-free half- -half raisins vanilla extract
directions_text: spray a small slow cooker lightly with cooking spray. mix oats, 1/2 cup brown sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a large bowl. stir in pumpkin. stir in water and half-and-half gradually. stir in raisins and vanilla extract. ladle oat mixture into the slow cooker. cook on low until oats are soft and creamy, 7 1/2 to 8 1/2 hours. sprinkle 2 tablespoons plus 2 teaspoons brown sugar and 5 tablespoons plus 1 teaspoon walnuts over oatmeal.

directions_raw: Spray a small slow cooker lightly with cooking spray.
Mix oats, 1/2 cup brown sugar, cinnamon, and nutmeg together in a large bowl. Stir in pumpkin. Stir in water and half-and-half gradually. Stir in raisins and vanilla extract.
Ladle oat mixture into the slow cooker. Cook on Low until oats are soft and creamy, 7 1/2 to 8 1/2 hours.
Sprinkle 2 tablespoons plus 2 teaspoons brown sugar and 5 tablespoons plus 1 teaspoon walnuts over oatmeal.
ingredients_canonical: ½ firmly packed light brown sugar

recipe_title: Coconut Overnight Oats with Protein Powder
description: These overnight oats are creamy, full of coconut flavor, and high in protein. Great either cold or warmed and sure to keep you feeling full until way after lunch. I find that the protein powder sweetens the oats enough but feel free to add your choice of sweetener if needed. I top my oats just before serving with additional toasted coconut.
ingredients: 1 cup coconut milk beverage (such as Silk®)
1 (5.3 ounce) container toasted coconut Greek yogurt (such as Light & Fit®)
directions: Mix coconut milk beverage, Greek yogurt, oats, coconut, and protein powder in a bowl until well combined. Divide mixture between 2 Mason jars. Refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.
ingredient_text: coconut milk beverage such as silk ounce container toasted coconut greek yogurt such as light fit ¾ oats sweetened flaked coconut scoop vanilla protein powder
directions_text: mix coconut milk beverage, greek yogurt, oats, coconut, and protein powder in a bowl until well combined. divide mixture between 2 mason jars. refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.
combined_text: coconut overnight oats with protein powder overnight oats overnight oats 1 cup coconut milk beverage (such as silk®) 1 (5.3 ounce) container toasted coconut greek yogurt (such as light & fit®) ¾ cup oats 2 tablespoons sweetened flaked coconut 1 scoop vanilla protein powder mix coconut milk beverage, greek yogurt, oats, coconut, and protein powder in a bowl until well combined. divide mixture between 2 mason jars. refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.
ingredients_raw: 1 cup coconut milk beverage (such as Silk®)
1 (5.3 ounce) container toasted coconut Greek yogurt (such as Light & Fit®)
directions_raw: Mix coconut milk beverage, Greek yogurt, oats, coconut, and protein powder in a bowl until well combined. Divide mixture between 2 Mason jars. Refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.

ounce container toasted coconut greek yogurt such as light fit

description: Save calories, while keeping a hearty portion, by using apple butter and chai tea to flavor the oats, without added sugars. If you need a little something extra on top, try adding toasted pecans, a chopped banana, or fresh blueberries. Serve chilled or microwave for 1 minute for a hot dish.
directions: Combine rolled oats, chai tea, almond milk, and apple butter in a jar or bowl.
Refrigerate until oats are soft, 2 hours to overnight. Stir before eating.
ingredient_text: ½ rolled oats ½ brewed chai tea ½ unsweetened almond milk apple butter
directions_text: combine rolled oats, chai tea, almond milk, and apple butter in a jar or bowl. refrigerate until oats are soft, 2 hours to overnight. stir before eating.
combined_text: spiced chai overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats ½ cup rolled oats ½ cup brewed chai tea ½ cup unsweetened almond milk 2 tablespoons apple butter combine rolled oats, chai tea, almond milk, and apple butter in a jar or bowl. refrigerate until oats are soft, 2 hours to overnight. stir before eating.
directions_raw: Combine rolled oats, chai tea, almond milk, and apple butter in a jar or bowl.
Refrigerate until oats are soft, 2 hours to overnight. Stir before eating.

description: Start your day off with a high protein breakfast that's made the night before. A vegan option using Silk® milk. Dessert in the morning? Yes please!
ingredients: ½ cup Protein Chocolate Pea, Almond and Cashewmilk (such as Silk®)
2 tablespoons powdered peanut butter (such as PBFit®)
directions: Combine chocolate protein milk, oats, peanut butter powder, and chia seeds in a 1/2 pint jar with lid. Cover jar with lid.
Refrigerate oatmeal for 8 hours or overnight.
ingredient_text: ½ protein chocolate pea almond cashewmilk such as silk ½ quick rolled oats powdered peanut butter such as pbfit ¾ chia seeds
directions_text: combine chocolate protein milk, oats, peanut butter powder, and chia seeds in a 1/2 pint jar with lid. cover jar with lid. refrigerate oatmeal for 8 hours or overnight.

2 tablespoons powdered peanut butter (such as PBFit®)

powdered peanut butter such as pbfit

recipe_title: Vegan Pumpkin Overnight Oats in the Slow Cooker
description: Sweetener can be added during cooking or you can cook it without and then each person can add their own sweetener of choice on top after cooking.
directions: Combine water, steel-cut oats, almond milk, pumpkin puree, vanilla extract, pumpkin pie spice, and salt in a slow cooker.
Cook on Low for 8 hours.
ingredient_text: ½ water steel-cut oats almond milk canned pumpkin puree vanilla extract pumpkin pie spice ¼ salt
directions_text: combine water, steel-cut oats, almond milk, pumpkin puree, vanilla extract, pumpkin pie spice, and salt in a slow cooker. cook on low for 8 hours.
combined_text: vegan pumpkin overnight oats in the slow cooker overnight oats overnight oats 2 ½ cups water 1 cup steel-cut oats 1 cup almond milk 1 cup canned pumpkin puree 1 teaspoon vanilla extract 1 teaspoon pumpkin pie spice ¼ teaspoon salt combine water, steel-cut oats, almond milk, pumpkin puree, vanilla extract, pumpkin pie spice, and salt in a slow cooker. cook on low for 8 hours.
directions_raw: Combine water, steel-cut oats, almond milk, pumpkin puree, vanilla extract, pumpkin pie spice, and salt in a slow cooker.
Cook on Low for 8 hours.

description: These creamy coconut overnight oats have a great flavor and a boost of protein from Greek yogurt and chia seeds. I topped them with cacao nibs and almonds, but feel free to use fresh fruit or any other topping. Add honey or maple syrup if you like them sweeter.
ingredients: ¼ cup nonfat vanilla Greek yogurt
1 ½ tablespoons unsweetened shredded coconut, divided
directions: Combine oats, coconut milk beverage, Greek yogurt, chia seeds, and 1 tablespoon coconut flakes in an 8-ounce Mason jar. Stir until well combined, and cover with a lid. Refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.
Top with ½ tablespoon coconut flakes, cacao nibs, and almonds flakes when ready to serve. Stir and enjoy.
ingredient_text: ⅓ old-fashioned oats ⅓ coconut milk beverage ¼ nonfat vanilla greek yogurt ½ chia seeds ½ unsweetened shredded coconut divided ½ cacao nibs ½ sliced almonds
directions_text: combine oats, coconut milk beverage, greek yogurt, chia seeds, and 1 tablespoon coconut flakes in an 8-ounce mason jar. stir until well combined, and cover with a lid. refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight. top with ½ tablespoon coconut flakes, cacao nibs, and almonds flakes when ready to serve. stir and enjoy.
combined_text: coconut overnight oats overnight oats overnight oats ⅓ cup old-fashioned oats ⅓ cup coconut milk beverage ¼ cup nonfat vanilla greek yogurt ½ tablespoon chia seeds 1 ½ tablespoons unsweetened shredded coconut, divided ½ tablespoon cacao nibs ½ tablespoon sliced almonds combine oats, coconut milk beverage, greek yogurt, chia seeds, and 1 tablespoon coconut flakes in an 8-ounce mason jar. stir until well combined, and cover with a lid. refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight. top with ½ tablespoon coconut flakes, cacao nibs, and almonds flakes when ready to serve. stir and enjoy.
ingredients_raw: ¼ cup nonfat vanilla Greek yogurt
1 ½ tablespoons unsweetened shredded coconut, divided
directions_raw: Combine oats, coconut milk beverage, Greek yogurt, chia seeds, and 1 tablespoon coconut flakes in an 8-ounce Mason jar. Stir until well combined, and cover with a lid. Refrigerate for 8 hours, or overnight.
Top with ½ tablespoon coconut flakes, cacao nibs, and almonds flakes when ready to serve. Stir and enjoy.
